name: GoHighLevel
notes: Carried over from OperatorStack — VERIFY with GHL whether the same fp_ref code can be used for promoting from medspaoperator.io. Industry standard for medspa lead reactivation and automated booking funnels.

name: Birdeye
notes: One of the highest lifetime payouts for reputation management in 2026. Apply: https://birdeye.com/partners

name: Vagaro
notes: One of the most reliable lifetime programs for small-to-mid medspas. Apply: https://www.vagaro.com/affiliate

name: Pabau
notes: Top-rated European medspa EMR aggressively expanding in US with lifetime partner track. Apply: https://pabau.com/partners

name: Podium
notes: Payouts capped at first 12 months of subscription. Apply: https://www.podium.com/partners/

name: Mailchimp
notes: Commissions capped at first 12 months. Apply: https://mailchimp.com/affiliates/

name: Boulevard
commission: Up to $1,500 bounty ($750 completed demo + $750 closed sale)
notes: Two-stage bounty structure — get paid for the demo even before the sale closes. Premium medspa platform. Apply: https://www.joinblvd.com/partners

name: Zenoti
notes: Enterprise tier — referral fee scales with size of the medspa center. High-ticket but bounty only. Apply: https://www.zenoti.com/partners

name: Aesthetic Record
notes: Primarily bounty-based for new clinic signups. Apply: https://www.aestheticrecord.com/partners

name: Symplast
notes: Performance-based one-time payment upon successful onboarding. Apply: https://www.symplast.com/partners

name: Cherry (Patient Financing)
commission: Up to $1,000 bounty (prepaid digital gift card per approved practice)
notes: Paid as prepaid digital gift card per approved practice referral. Different angle — financing not software. Apply: https://withcherry.com/partners
